ayuda.title: Help & Support
ayuda.subtitle: Find answers to your questions and learn how to use EasyFactu
ayuda.noResults: No results found for your search

faq.a1: VeriFactu is the invoice verification system of the Spanish Tax Agency (AEAT). EasyFactu implements this standard to ensure all your invoices comply with current tax regulations.
faq.q2: How do I create my first issued invoice?
faq.a2: Go to 'Issued Invoices' and click 'New Invoice'. Fill in the series number, tax ID, issuer name, date, invoice type and amounts. The VAT quota is calculated automatically.
faq.q3: How do I record a received invoice?
faq.a3: Go to 'Received Invoices' and click 'New Invoice'. Select the supplier, enter the invoice data and optionally attach the PDF. Overdue invoices are highlighted in red.
faq.a4: This action sends the invoice to the AEAT registration system for official validation. Once validated, you will receive a CSV (Security Verification Code) that certifies the invoice.
faq.q5: How do I install my digital certificate?
faq.a5: Go to 'Settings' → 'Certificates' tab. Drag your .p12 file to the upload area, enter the password and click 'Upload'. Then activate it to use it in communications with AEAT.
faq.a6: F1: Full invoice (standard). F2: Simplified (receipts). R1-R5: Rectificative (corrections to previous invoices under article 80 of the VAT Law).
faq.q7: Can I use the app in multiple languages?
faq.a7: Yes. EasyFactu is available in Spanish, English, Portuguese, French and German. Change the language from the selector in the top bar.
faq.q8: How does the Tax Summary work?
faq.a8: The Tax section automatically aggregates data from your issued and received invoices to show you a summary of income, expenses, VAT payable/recoverable and a fiscal result estimate.

g1Steps: Configure your company data in Settings → Company
Add your clients in the Clients section
Add your suppliers in the Suppliers section
Issue your first invoice in Issued Invoices
g2Steps: Create invoices with a unique series number (e.g. A-2026-001)
Select the applicable VAT rate (0%, 4%, 10% or 21%)
Use 'Submit to AEAT' to officially validate each invoice
Download the validation CSV as proof
g3Steps: Obtain your .p12 certificate from FNMT or AEAT
Upload the certificate with your password
Activate it to sign communications with AEAT

contact.docsDesc: Official Tax Agency portal for information about VeriFactu
